title: Acceptance
doc_html:
Art. 3150. Acceptance

            A written contract of pledge need not be signed by the pledgee, whose consent is presumed and whose acceptance may be tacit.

            Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
Art. 3150.  Acceptance
A written contract of pledge need not be signed by the pledgee, whose consent is
presumed and whose acceptance may be tacit.
Acts 2014, No. 281, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
